description: CBOE SKEW tail-hedging detector. SKEW>=150 + 5+ days elevated + VVIX confirmation = TAIL_HEDGE_RICH (defensive). SKEW<=110 + 5+ days low = COMPLACENCY_RICH (cheap hedge buy). Bali-Murray 2013, Bollerslev-Todorov 2011, Whaley 2008. ~55% hit tail event / 30-60d; cheap insurance at complacency. Daily 22:30 UTC.
